title: Warm Indulgent Jamaican Tamarind Tagine
description: This rich and sour Jamaican stew is perfect for a cold night in. Featuring the deep flavor of tamarind, the tang of shio-cure, and the richness of protein-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: tamarind pulp
ingredients.notes: pulp and seeds from 4-6 tamarind fruits

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tamarind pulp, shio-cure chicken breast, ground allspice, ground cinnamon, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
Adjust seasoning with salt and black pepper as needed.
